title: D-Dimer Test: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
ventilation scan measures how air moves in and out of your lungs. The perfusion scan measures how blood flows in the lungs. They both use small amounts of radioactive tracer to help a scanning machine check how well your lungs are working.
